  <script type="text/javascript">
    var bannerContainer;

    bannerContainer = document.getElementById('nav-app-banner-container');

    if (bannerContainer) {
        // the banner is hidden by default
        handleBannerShowIfCloseCookieNotFound();
    }
    function isInternalClick(referrerUrl) {
      const prefixes = [
          "https://www.amazon",
          "http://www.amazon",
          "http://amazon",
          "https://amazon"
      ];
      
      // Check if the URL starts with any of the prefixes
      for (let prefix of prefixes) {
          if (referrerUrl.startsWith(prefix)) {
              return true;
          }
      }
      return false;
  }

    function getCookie(name) {
        var value = ";"+document.cookie;
        var parts = value.split("; "+name+"=");
        if (parts.length === 2) return parts.pop().split(';').shift();
        return null;
    }
    function handleBannerShowIfCloseCookieNotFound() {
      var referrer = document.referrer;

      if (!referrer || !isInternalClick(referrer)) {
          // delete the 'close-app-banner-clicked-v2' cookie
          document.cookie = 'close-app-banner-clicked-v2=; expires=Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 UTC; path=/;';
      } else if ((getCookie('close-app-banner-clicked-v2'))) {
          return;
      }

      // Show the banner if the 'close-app-banner-clicked-v2' cookie is not found
      bannerContainer.style.display = 'block';
  }
  </script>

                    var viewPortWidth = viewportDimension().width - 20;

                    treatment: "T2",
                    setNewPaginationDots: function (currentDot, prevDot) {
                        var dots = $("#image-block-pagination-dots li");
                        var totalDots = dots && dots.length;

                        // if the total dots are more than 5 then we need to change css of dots based on selected dot's position.
                        if (totalDots > 5) {
                            var ulDots = $("#image-block-pagination-dots ul");

                            /* We can swipe the image circularly, 
                               If there are total 7 Dots, then when we swipe (7 -> 1) and (7 <- 1) then we don't show any transition.
                               So based on this we will remove CSS class and add CSS class in normal case (ex. 1->2->...->7 or 7->6->...->1) */
                            if ((currentDot == 0 && prevDot == totalDots - 1) || currentDot == totalDots - 1 && prevDot == 0) {
                                ulDots.removeClass("transition-dots");
                            } else {
                                ulDots.addClass("transition-dots");
                            }
                            for (var id = 0; id < totalDots; id++) {
                                dots.eq(id).removeClass("hidden-dot small");
                            }
                            // Distance from current dot = 2 then those dots are small
                            // Distance from current dot > 2 then those dots are hidden
                            if (currentDot >= 2 && currentDot < totalDots - 2) {
                                for (var id = 0; id < currentDot - 2; id++) {
                                    dots.eq(id).addClass("hidden-dot");
                                }
                                for (var id = currentDot + 3; id < totalDots; id++) {
                                    dots.eq(id).addClass("hidden-dot");
                                }
                                dots.eq(currentDot - 2).addClass("small");
                                dots.eq(currentDot + 2).addClass("small");

                                // Adding transition property
                                if (currentDot >= 3) {
                                    var translateValue = -16 * (currentDot - 2) ;
                                    var translateProperty = "translate(" + (translateValue) + "px)";
                                    var direction = document.documentElement.getAttribute('dir') || 'ltr';
                                    // Adjust translate value based on direction
                                    if (direction === 'rtl') {
                                        translateProperty = "translate(" + (-parseInt(translateValue, 10)) + "px)";
                                    }
                                    ulDots.css("transform", translateProperty);
                                } else {
                                    ulDots.css("transform", "translate(0px)");
                                }
                            }
                            else if (currentDot < 2) {
                                for (var id = 5; id < totalDots; id++) {
                                    dots.eq(id).addClass("hidden-dot");
                                }
                                if (totalDots > 5) {
                                    dots.eq(4).addClass("small");
                                }
                                ulDots.css("transform", "translate(0px)");
                            }
                            else {
                                for (var id = totalDots - 6; id >= 0; id--) {
                                    dots.eq(id).addClass("hidden-dot");
                                }
                                if (totalDots > 5) {
                                    dots.eq(totalDots - 5).addClass("small");
                                    var translateValue = -16 * (totalDots - 5);
                                    var translateProperty = "translate(" + (translateValue) + "px)";
                                    var direction = document.documentElement.getAttribute('dir') || 'ltr';
                                    // Adjust translate value based on direction
                                    if (direction === 'rtl') {
                                        translateProperty = "translate(" + (-parseInt(translateValue, 10)) + "px)";
                                    }
                                    ulDots.css("transform", translateProperty);
                                }
                            }
                        }

               <script type="text/javascript">

    P.when('A', 'ready').execute(function (A) {
        var $ = A.$;

        function createNexusEvent(impressionSchema) {
            let attributesMap = {
                buyingOption : impressionSchema.buyingOptionName,
                buyingOptionIndex : String(impressionSchema.buyingOptionIndex),
                robot : "false",
                issuancePlacementShortNm : impressionSchema.issuancePlacementShortNm
            }
            // Event payload for Nexus should contain all the attributes present in schema 'odysseus.Impression'
            let event = {
                sessionId : impressionSchema.sessionId,
                impressionId : impressionSchema.impressionId,
                requestId : impressionSchema.requestId,
                marketplaceId : impressionSchema.marketplaceId,
                attributes : attributesMap,
                lob: window.ue_lob
            };

            return event;
        }

        function publishNexusEvent(asin, index, issuanceOcfSelectorId, requestId){
            let impressionSchema = A.state("impressionSchema_" + requestId + "-" + asin + ":" + index);
            if(impressionSchema) {
                let event = createNexusEvent(impressionSchema);
                ue.event(event, impressionSchema.nexusProducerId, impressionSchema.nexusSchemaId);
                $(issuanceOcfSelectorId).attr('visited', "true");
            }
        }

        // Publish impression metrics to Nexus upon toggling non-landing buying options
        A.on('a:accordion:buybox-accordion:select', function (data){
            let buyingOptionIndex = A.$(data.selectedRow.$row).index();
            let issuanceOcfSelector = '.issuance_ocf_selector#issuanceOcfAccordianRowName_' + buyingOptionIndex;
            if(issuanceOcfSelector) {
                let isVisited = $(issuanceOcfSelector).attr("visited");
                if (isVisited === 'false' && window.ue) {
                    let asin = $(issuanceOcfSelector).attr("asin");
                    let requestId = $(issuanceOcfSelector).attr("requestId");
                    publishNexusEvent(asin, buyingOptionIndex, issuanceOcfSelector, requestId)
                }
            }
        });

        // Publish impression metrics to Nexus upon switching tab
        A.on('a:tabs:offerDisplayGroup_tabs:select', function (data){
            let visitedAccordionRow = $("#issuancePriceblockAmabot_feature_div > .offersConsistencyEnabled").children().filter(function () {
                return $(this).css('display') === 'block';
            });
            let issuanceOcfSelector = $(visitedAccordionRow).find(".issuance_ocf_selector");
            if(issuanceOcfSelector) {
                let isVisited = $(issuanceOcfSelector).attr("visited");
                if (isVisited === 'false' && window.ue) {
                    let asin = $(issuanceOcfSelector).attr("asin");
                    let requestId = $(issuanceOcfSelector).attr("requestId");
                    let buyingOptionIndex = $(issuanceOcfSelector).attr('id').split('_')[1];
                    publishNexusEvent(asin, buyingOptionIndex, issuanceOcfSelector, requestId)
                }
            }
        });
    });
</script>                                  </div>                                                  <div id="taxInclusiveMessage_feature_div" data-csa-c-asin="" data-csa-c-content-id="taxInclusiveMessage" data-csa-c-is-in-initial-active-row="false" data-csa-c-slot-id="taxInclusiveMessage_feature_div" data-csa-c-type="widget" data-feature-name="taxInclusiveMessage" data-template-name="taxInclusiveMessage" class="a-section a-spacing-none celwidget t-prnt t-full">                                               </div>                                                  <div id="delightPricingBadge_feature_div" data-csa-c-asin="" data-csa-c-content-id="delightPricingBadge" data-csa-c-is-in-initial-active-row="false" data-csa-c-slot-id="delightPricingBadge_feature_div" data-csa-c-type="widget" data-feature-name="delightPricingBadge" data-template-name="delightPricingBadge" class="a-section a-spacing-none celwidget t-prnt t-full">                  <!-- leaving comment so that file does not delete and we are not blocked until themis feature deletion. <script type="application/javascript">
    P.when("A", "load").execute("aod-assets-loaded", function(A){
        function logAssetsNotLoaded() {
            if (window.ueLogError) {
                var customError = { message: 'Failed to load AOD assets for WDG: ce_display_on_website, Device: mobile' };
                var additionalInfo = {
                    logLevel : 'ERROR',
                    attribution : 'aod_assets_not_loaded'
                };
                ueLogError (customError, additionalInfo);
            }
            if (window.ue && window.ue.count) {
                window.ue.count("aod-assets-not-loaded", 1);
            }
        }

        function verifyAssetsLoaded() {
            var assetsLoadedPageState = A.state('aod:assetsLoaded');
            var logAssetsNotLoadedState = A.state('aod:logAssetsNotLoaded');

            if((assetsLoadedPageState == null || !assetsLoadedPageState.isAodAssetsLoaded)
                && (logAssetsNotLoadedState == null || !logAssetsNotLoadedState.isAodAssetsNotLoadedLogged)) {
                A.state('aod:logAssetsNotLoaded', {isAodAssetsNotLoadedLogged: true});
                logAssetsNotLoaded();
            }
        }

        setTimeout(verifyAssetsLoaded, 50000)
    });
</script>                                        </div>                                                   <div id="faddMessageInsidePrimary_feature_div" data-csa-c-asin="B0D4WRLY9F" data-csa-c-content-id="faddMessageInsidePrimary" data-csa-c-is-in-initial-active-row="false" data-csa-c-slot-id="faddMessageInsidePrimary_feature_div" data-csa-c-type="widget" data-feature-name="faddMessageInsidePrimary" data-template-name="faddMessageInsidePrimary" class="a-section a-spacing-none celwidget t-prnt t-full">                                                                                       </div>                                                   <div id="globalStoreBadgePopoverInsideBuybox_feature_div" data-csa-c-asin="B0D4WRLY9F" data-csa-c-content-id="globalStoreBadgePopoverInsideBuybox" data-csa-c-is-in-initial-active-row="false" data-csa-c-slot-id="globalStoreBadgePopoverInsideBuybox_feature_div" data-csa-c-type="widget" data-feature-name="globalStoreBadgePopoverInsideBuybox" data-template-name="globalStoreBadgePopoverInsideBuybox" class="a-section a-spacing-none celwidget t-prnt t-full">                                                                      </div>                                                   <div id="mobileQuantity_feature_div" data-csa-c-asin="B0D4WRLY9F" data-csa-c-content-id="mobileQuantity" data-csa-c-is-in-initial-active-row="false" data-csa-c-slot-id="mobileQuantity_feature_div" data-csa-c-type="widget" data-feature-name="mobileQuantity" data-template-name="mobileQuantity" class="a-section a-spacing-none celwidget t-prnt t-full">                               <style type="text/css">

(function(d,w){
    var url = "https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/716IY6TiAXL._AC_UF894,1000_QL80_.jpg";
    var i = new Image();
    i.onload = function () {
        var img = d.getElementById("main-image");
        if (img) {
            img.src = url;

             
            var imgWidth = img.width;
            var imgHeight = img.height;

            
            var hiResWidth = img.naturalWidth;
            var hiResHeight = img.naturalHeight;

            try {
                
                var hiResHeightGood = (imgWidth / hiResWidth) * hiResHeight;
                var heightDistortion = (Math.abs(hiResHeightGood - imgHeight) / imgHeight).toFixed(2);

                
                if (heightDistortion > .01) {
                    if (window.ue) {
                        window.ue.count("imageBlock-mobile-hi_res", 1);
                    }
                    if (window.ueLogError) {
                        var customError = { message: '[ImageBlock Hi-Res: Size distortion. ASIN:B0D4WRLY9F Diff:' + heightDistortion.toString() + ']' };
                        var additionalInfo = {
                            logLevel: 'WARN',
                            attribution: 'imageBlock-mobile-hi_res'
                        };
                        window.ueLogError(customError, additionalInfo);
                    }
                }
            }
            catch (e) {
                if (window.ueLogError) {
                    var additionalInfo = {
                        logLevel: 'WARN',
                        attribution: 'imageBlock-mobile-hi_res'
                    };
                    window.ueLogError(e, additionalInfo);
                }
            }
            
        }
        
        w.setDPTimestamp("mainImgRepl", img ? "inlineScript2" : "mainImgNotFound");
    }
    i.src = url;
})(document,window);

    P.when('jQuery').register('airy-image-block', function($) {
        
        var shouldDetachExitFullScreen = false;
        
        var currentIndex = 0;
        var currentVideoIndex = 0;
        var curContext;
        var videoIndexPlayedPV = {};
        var videoIndexPlayedIV = {};
        var newAiryConfig = null;
        var updateStateElement = $('#image-block');
        return {
            
            updateStateForAction : function($carousel, index, airyConfig) {
                if (!airyConfig) {return;}
                var airyInstance = airyConfig.instance;
                if (airyInstance) {
                    airyInstance.pause();
                }
                currentVideoIndex = index;
                curContext = airyConfig.contextName;
                var $selectedCarouselItem = $carousel
                        .find('li.a-carousel-card')
                        .eq(index - 1);
                var $playerContainer = $selectedCarouselItem.find('.airy-player-container');
                if (!$playerContainer.length) {
                    
                    return;
                }
                if (airyInstance) {
                    this._attachAndLoadMedia(airyInstance, $playerContainer);
                    

                    return;
                }
                P.when('Airy').execute(function() {
                    airyInstance = this._embed($playerContainer, airyConfig.contextName);
                    airyConfig.embeddedCallback(airyInstance);

                    
                }.bind(this));

            },
            
            _embed : function($playerContainer, contextName) {
                var $videoMetadata = $('#image-block-video-metadata');
                var foresterParams = $videoMetadata.data('forester-params');
                if (contextName != null) {
                    foresterParams.method += '.' + contextName;
                }
                var airyInstance;
                var that = this;
                var playerConfig = {
                    foresterMetadataParams : foresterParams,
                    mediaSourceInfo : $playerContainer.data('video-url'),
                    parentElement : $playerContainer[0],
                    
                    bindings : {
                        screenchange : function() {
                          
                            var airyConfig = that.getNewAiryConfig();
                            
                            if(airyConfig) {
                                airyInstance = airyConfig.instance;
                                if(airyInstance && !airyInstance.isFullScreen() && that.shouldDetachOnExitFullScreen()) {
                                    that.setShouldDetachOnExitFullScreen(false);
                                    that._detachAiryInstance(airyInstance);

                                    
                                    that.updateStateForAction(that.getUpdateStateElement(), that.getCurrentIndex(), that.getNewAiryConfig());
                                }
                            }
                        },
                        normalscreen : function() {
                            if(!airyInstance && airyConfig) {
                                airyInstance = airyConfig.instance;
                            }
                        },
                        play : function() {
                            
                            var inImmersive = curContext === 'ImmersiveView';
                            var videoMap = inImmersive ? videoIndexPlayedIV : videoIndexPlayedPV;
                            var metric = inImmersive ? "dpmob_videoPlayedIV" : "dpmob_videoPlayedPV";
                            if (!videoMap[currentVideoIndex]) {
                                videoMap[currentVideoIndex] = true;
                                if(window.ue && ue.count) { ue.count(metric); }
                            }
                             
                            airyInstance.enterFullScreen({isAsync : true});
                            
                        },
                        uiready : function() {
                             
                        }
                    },
                    
                    installFlashButtonText : "Flash Player をインストール ",
                    installFlashPrompt : "この動画をご覧いただくには Adobe Flash Player が必要です。",
                    playbackErrorPrompt : "申し訳ありませんが、動画の再生を試みている最中にエラーが発生しました。後でもう一度試してください。",
